nasb.text: So Joshua sent messengers, and they ran to the tent; and behold, it was concealed in his tent with the silver underneath it.

esv.text: So Joshua sent messengers, and they ran to the tent; and behold, it was hidden in his tent with the silver underneath.

cnv.text: 約書亞就派人跑到亞干的帳棚裡，果然見到東西埋藏在那裡，銀子在底下。

ccb.text: 约书亚派人跑到他的帐篷里，果然在那里找到了那件衣服和衣服下面的银子。
